_comments.agiloft.base_url: Base URL for your Agiloft instance (must use HTTPS)
_comments.agiloft.password: Password for legacy login (prefer AGILOFT_PASSWORD env var)
_comments.agiloft.oauth2.client_secret: OAuth2 Client Secret (prefer AGILOFT_OAUTH2_CLIENT_SECRET env var)
_comments.agiloft.oauth2.token_endpoint: OAuth2 token endpoint URL (must use HTTPS)
_comments.agiloft.oauth2.authorization_endpoint: OAuth2 authorization endpoint (for authorization_code flow only)
_comments.agiloft.oauth2.redirect_uri: Callback URL for authorization_code flow (default: http://localhost:8080/callback)
_comments.server.port: Port for MCP server (not used in stdio mode)
_comments.server.max_retries: Maximum number of API request retries

agiloft._legacy_auth: Set auth_method to 'legacy' and provide username/password:
agiloft._oauth2_auth: Set auth_method to 'oauth2_client_credentials' and provide oauth2 config:
